div.head: The Consul General at Tientsin (Caldwell) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 56. Reference Department’s 78, February 18, 7 p.m. Japanese Consul has requested informally for presentation to Japanese military, a list of all unsettled American property losses incurred due to the present Sino-Japanese “incident”, actual loss or damage, amount involved and circumstances. British Consul General has supplied similar list to Japanese Consul General which I have seen. I am preparing list and will forward it informally to the Japanese Consul General, and send copies to the Department and the Embassies at Tokyo and Hankow unless otherwise instructed.
